nasb.text: And Rehoboam slept with his fathers and was buried in the city of David; and his son Abijah became king in his place.

esv.text: And Rehoboam slept with his fathers and was buried in the city of David, and Abijah his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 羅波安和他的列祖同睡，埋葬在大衛城裡。他的兒子亞比雅接續他作王。

ccb.text: 罗波安与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城。他儿子亚比雅继位。
